default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on GrowthX's content strategy for Homebase, focusing on glossary and programmatic SEO content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/W_2AULdP4G8zLugDuARdKxv4sWYWBZms?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Shifting to a balanced approach: 70% glossary (35,000 words/month) and 30% programmatic SEO (30 pages/month)](https://fathom.video/share/W_2AULdP4G8zLugDuARdKxv4sWYWBZms?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [New glossary design finalized; aiming for February launch](https://fathom.video/share/W_2AULdP4G8zLugDuARdKxv4sWYWBZms?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
  - [Implementing quarterly content planning to streamline approval process and increase efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/W_2AULdP4G8zLugDuARdKxv4sWYWBZms?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [Focus areas: payroll, scheduling, time tracking, task management, AI for small businesses, restaurant/retail verticals](https://fathom.video/share/W_2AULdP4G8zLugDuARdKxv4sWYWBZms?tab=summary&timestamp=1118.0)

## Topics

### Glossary Content Strategy

  - [466 potential keywords identified; team to evaluate and research further](https://fathom.video/share/W_2AULdP4G8zLugDuARdKxv4sWYWBZms?tab=summary&timestamp=1180.0)
  - [Targeting \~1000 words per glossary page](https://fathom.video/share/W_2AULdP4G8zLugDuARdKxv4sWYWBZms?tab=summary&timestamp=1270.0)
  - [Key focus areas: payroll, business startup, employee scheduling, time tracking](https://fathom.video/share/W_2AULdP4G8zLugDuARdKxv4sWYWBZms?tab=summary&timestamp=1118.0)
  - [Aiming to have significant content ready for February launch](https://fathom.video/share/W_2AULdP4G8zLugDuARdKxv4sWYWBZms?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)

### Programmatic SEO Approach

  - [Shifting focus to high-volume search topics for demonstrable growth](https://fathom.video/share/W_2AULdP4G8zLugDuARdKxv4sWYWBZms?tab=summary&timestamp=1483.0)
  - [Potential topics: employee benefits, employer rights, overtime laws](https://fathom.video/share/W_2AULdP4G8zLugDuARdKxv4sWYWBZms?tab=summary&timestamp=1966.0)
  - [Team to review and enrich keyword lists provided by Homebase's SEO team](https://fathom.video/share/W_2AULdP4G8zLugDuARdKxv4sWYWBZms?tab=summary&timestamp=1966.0)

### Content Workflow Optimization

  - [Moving to quarterly content planning instead of weekly approvals](https://fathom.video/share/W_2AULdP4G8zLugDuARdKxv4sWYWBZms?tab=summary&timestamp=2400.0)
  - [Process: GrowthX to create extensive content strategy \> Homebase approval \> GrowthX executes without constant check-ins](https://fathom.video/share/W_2AULdP4G8zLugDuARdKxv4sWYWBZms?tab=summary&timestamp=2443.0)
  - [Victoria (Homebase) to provide ongoing feedback on content performance](https://fathom.video/share/W_2AULdP4G8zLugDuARdKxv4sWYWBZms?tab=summary&timestamp=2637.0)

### AI Implementation

  - [Team to explore leveraging AI for internal linking strategy](https://fathom.video/share/W_2AULdP4G8zLugDuARdKxv4sWYWBZms?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)
  - [Aim: Use AI to identify 4-5 relevant internal link opportunities for each new glossary page](https://fathom.video/share/W_2AULdP4G8zLugDuARdKxv4sWYWBZms?tab=summary&timestamp=1512.0)

### Homebase Product Context

  - [Core products: Payroll, employee scheduling, time tracking](https://fathom.video/share/W_2AULdP4G8zLugDuARdKxv4sWYWBZms?tab=summary&timestamp=2152.0)
  - [New focus areas: Background checks, task management](https://fathom.video/share/W_2AULdP4G8zLugDuARdKxv4sWYWBZms?tab=summary&timestamp=2254.0)
  - [Key verticals: Restaurants, retail stores, other brick-and-mortar businesses with hourly workers](https://fathom.video/share/W_2AULdP4G8zLugDuARdKxv4sWYWBZms?tab=summary&timestamp=2327.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Bisera to prepare 3 sample glossary pages (federal income tax, W4 form, payroll) by Monday](https://fathom.video/share/W_2AULdP4G8zLugDuARdKxv4sWYWBZms?tab=summary&timestamp=830.0)
  - [Kerry to share finalized glossary page designs](https://fathom.video/share/W_2AULdP4G8zLugDuARdKxv4sWYWBZms?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)
  - [GrowthX team to conduct keyword research for glossary and programmatic SEO](https://fathom.video/share/W_2AULdP4G8zLugDuARdKxv4sWYWBZms?tab=summary&timestamp=1180.0)
  - [Kerry to provide list of programmatic SEO focus areas from Homebase's SEO team](https://fathom.video/share/W_2AULdP4G8zLugDuARdKxv4sWYWBZms?tab=summary&timestamp=2104.0)
  - [GrowthX to create and share extensive quarterly content strategy by end of next week](https://fathom.video/share/W_2AULdP4G8zLugDuARdKxv4sWYWBZms?tab=summary&timestamp=2585.0)
  - [Kerry to schedule a comprehensive Homebase product/content overview session](https://fathom.video/share/W_2AULdP4G8zLugDuARdKxv4sWYWBZms?tab=summary&timestamp=2639.0)

Prepare 3 sample glossary pages (Federal income tax, W4 form, Payroll) using Jasper AI by Monday
Share programmatic SEO areas identified by Sac
Schedule call to present full Homebase context & content strategy overview
Download & send Ahrefs keyword list for glossary
Draft detailed content creation workflow doc (phases, approvals, roles)
Create quarterly content strategy doc incl. keywords/topics for glossary & programmatic SEO
